channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 6,5 Go de textures dans moins d’un Go : la magie noire de Nvidia arrive et c’est bien plus prometteur que le DLSS 5
item.description: Faire tenir 6,5 Go de textures haute définition dans seulement 970 Mo de VRAM.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs TV 4K 75 pouces en 2026 ?
item.description: Marre de votre petit téléviseur ? Craquez donc pour une grande TV de 75 ou de 77 pouces. Que ce soit pour un film, un match de foot ou pour jouer, l'immersion ne sera que meilleure !

item.title: Battlefield 6 captures the 'gritty, authentic, modern soldier experience' according to its audio director
item.description: The Battlefield 6 audio director has discussed how the game's soundtrack captures a "gritty" tone.

item.title: The ‘Mass Effect’ Show is Getting Rewritten to Get Greenlit
item.description: If Prime Video gets to adapt 'Mass Effect,' it'll be 'non-gamer friendly,' whatever that means.

item.title: Samsung will discontinue its Messages app in July and replace it with Google's
item.description: Samsung is putting the final nail in the coffin for its own messaging app. The smartphone maker posted an "End of Service Announcement" on its website, revealing that the Samsung Messages app will no longer be available by July of this year. Samsung also recommended that anyone still using Samsung Messages switch over to Google Messages as the default messaging app. For Samsung Messages users in the US, the switch to Google offers RCS messaging that lets you send high-quality media, join group chats and get real-time typing indicators no matter the smartphone's OS. Galaxy smartphone owners may...

item.title: The Spaceballs sequel has a release date
item.description: Amazon MGM Studios announced the 'Spaceballs 2' release date ahead of CinemaCon 2026.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: ‘A stunning lack of transparency’
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation. T

item.title: Cover you eyes! Why the MAFS Australia 2026 finale will be brutal to watch
item.description: We uncovered a sneaky way to watch MAFS Australia 2026 for free — without splashing all your cash.

item.title: Suno is a music copyright nightmare
item.description: AI music platform Suno's policy is that it does not permit the use of copyrighted material. You can upload your own tracks to remix or set your original lyrics to AI-generated music. But, it's supposed to recognize and stop you from using other people's songs and lyrics. Now, no system is perfect, but it turns […]

item.title: 'We go to great lengths to record real sounds' — Battlefield 6 team reveals they shot up cars and destroyed shipping containers to capture authentic audio
item.description: The Battlefield 6 audio team have revealed some of the ways they

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episodes 1-3 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Returning to Gilead for the faint of heart. But when do The Testaments episodes 1-3 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: iPhone 17e vs iPhone 16e : comment choisir le meilleur iPhone ?
item.description: Les iPhone 17e et 16e sont-ils les deux faces d'une même pièce ? C'est un peu plus compliqué que ça. Malgré des changements esthétiques inexistants, il y a de vraies bonnes nouvelles à l'intérieur du nouveau modèle ! On vous explique tout dans ce nouveau comparo.

item.title: Can orbital data centers help justify a massive valuation for SpaceX?
item.description: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, we debated Elon Musk's vision for data centers in space.
